decisions: Skipped staleness/contradiction/gap checks — all memory files were created in this same heartbeat session (Migration A+B), containing only empty templates. No real content to assess.
Produced the reflection report despite empty state, to establish a baseline date for the '3+ days since last reflection' trigger in future heartbeats.
observations: All 3 core memory files (MISTAKES.md, PREFERENCES.md, LEARNINGS.md) contain only placeholder text — no real entries yet
SUMMARY.md was generated from CLAUDE.md identity only, with no memory content to consolidate
TODAY.md has exactly 1 entry (the bootstrap log line) — appropriate for first session
No semantic/, episodic/ (except this reflection), or procedural/ content exists yet — all tiers are empty
recommendations: After 3-5 user interactions, check whether core/MISTAKES.md and core/PREFERENCES.md have accumulated entries — empty files after meaningful conversations would indicate routing logic is not triggering. Success criterion: at least 1 entry in each core file after 5 sessions with real user interactions.
Verify daily log continuity after the first week — memory/TODAY.md should have entries for each session day. Success criterion: daily-log-weekly-coverage >= 0.8 in next consolidation.
processImprovements: [self-critique] This reflection is necessarily trivial — there's nothing to reflect on in a brand new brain. The real test will be the next reflection after actual user interactions have occurred.
[proposal] In the next reflection (around 2026-04-24), focus on whether daily logging has started. If TODAY.md still only has the bootstrap entry, escalate as a process failure.

[blocked] Cannot assess gap-impact-analysis (self-assessment: false) because no memory gaps have had time to cause operational consequences yet — this criterion will become meaningful after the brain has been active for several sessions.
